name: The Bunker
about: The Bunker is a craft cocktail lounge and multi-sport simulator venue located in downtown Jackson Hole, Wyoming. It features two PGA-endorsed, Full Swing multi-sport golf simulators that use advanced overhead ION3 and infrared camera technology to provide realistic ball flight tracking. The venue combines a vintage speakeasy atmosphere with a full-service bar offering handcrafted cocktails, local beers, and a curated wine list. It operates on a flexible model, offering hourly bay rentals, various membership tiers, and private event hosting for groups of all sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Full Swing simulators with advanced ION3 and camera technology for realistic ball flight
Two private simulator bays offering an exclusive and immersive golf experience
Unique combination of high-tech golf simulation and a high-end cocktail lounge atmosphere
Flexible booking options including memberships and extended session times
PGA-endorsed technology ensures a high-quality simulation experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service serving comfort food. Food packages are available for private events. 15-20% food discount available for members.
Full-service bar with handcrafted cocktails, local and regional draft beers, and a curated wine and spirits list. Alcohol consumption is allowed but must be responsible.

simulator_hardware.notes: Two state-of-the-art multi-sport simulators with overhead ION3 Camera and infrared/high-speed blue light LED cameras for ball tracking.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are included with certain memberships and can be provided for non-members. Contact The Bunker for details on rental availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The Bunker has a full-service kitchen and bar. Bringing outside food or drink is not permitted, as they offer a wide menu of handcrafted cocktails, beers, and comfort food.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round typically takes about 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on the number of players in your bay and the speed of play.

faq.question: Is The Bunker kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Participants must be 6 years or older to use the golf simulators and 21 years or older for bar games, making it primarily an adult-oriented venue.
